title: Chapter 59
content:
Chapter 59: Chapter 59: The Taste

Below him, Ahena remained on her knees, a portrait of demonic devotion painted in the most carnal colors imaginable.

Her face was a mess—a beautiful, ruinous mess of ruby skin and white fluids. His seed clung to her eyelashes, streaked across her cheeks, and dripped slowly from her chin onto her chest. Most women would have rushed to wipe it away, to clean themselves of the evidence.

Ahena wore it like a crown.

"Mmm..." she hummed, her eyes closed as she ran her tongue over her upper lip, catching a stray droplet. "So potent... so warm."

She opened her eyes, fixing her glowing yellow gaze on his softening cock. It hung heavy and spent, glistening with the remnants of his release.

"You are dirty, Master," she whispered, her voice husky and thick with satisfaction. "Let Ahena make you pristine again."

She didn’t wait for permission. She leaned forward, her long, pink tongue darting out like a serpent.

Slurp.

She started at the base. Her tongue was hot, rougher than a human’s, textured with tiny, sensitive ridges that sent a fresh shiver of pleasure up Kai’s spine. She lapped at his balls first, cleaning the stray splatters from his sack with slow, deliberate strokes. She lifted them gently with her clawed fingers, cleaning underneath, humming a low vibration against his skin that made his toes curl.

"That’s it," Kai breathed, watching her work. "Get every drop."

"Every drop belongs to me," she murmured against his skin.

She moved up. She treated his shaft like a melting icicle. She swirled her tongue around the veins, licking upward in long, languid motions. She chased the trails of semen, devouring them with a greedy enthusiasm that bordered on worship.

When she reached the head, she opened her mouth wide. She didn’t suck this time; she engulfed him gently, letting her tongue bathe the sensitive glans in warmth. She swirled the tip, cleaning the slit, making sure not a single trace of his essence was wasted.

Schlop. Lick. Smack.

The wet sounds of her cleaning him were filthy, echoing softly in the quiet room. She was meticulous, turning his cock this way and that, inspecting her work with a critical eye, then diving back in to polish him off.

Finally, she pulled back. Her lips were slick, her chin dripping, but his cock was spotless, shining in the moonlight as if polished.

She looked up at him, her face still covered in his cum, and smiled. It was a wide, toothy, satisfied smile that showed off her fangs and her utter lack of shame.

"Clean as a whistle, Master," she purred, licking her lips one last time to savor the aftertaste.

Kai looked down at her. The sight of a Level ??? Demoness, a creature of legend, kneeling in his bedroom with his cum on her face, filled him with a dark, surging pride. He reached down and rested his hand on top of her head, tangling his fingers in her messy black hair.

"Good girl," Kai said, his voice low and authoritative. "You did well."

He gently pushed her head back, signaling the end of the session.

"Now go back," Kai commanded, stepping away from the window and pulling his trousers up. "Rest. Recover your energy. It’s enough for today."

Ahena stood up, her naked body glowing in the dark. She didn’t look disappointed to be dismissed; she looked energized, as if his seed had recharged her spiritual batteries.

"As you wish, my Master," she whispered, curtsying mockingly, her heavy breasts swaying with the movement.

She straightened up, winking at him through a mask of white.

"Call me when you need to be... drained again."

She raised her hand and snapped her fingers.

SNAP.

The sound was sharp and final.

A swirl of black and crimson smoke erupted around her feet, spiraling upward like a reverse tornado. It engulfed her curvy red form, obscuring the view of her messy face and wide hips. With a soft whoosh of displaced air, the smoke collapsed in on itself, vanishing into the ether.

The room was empty again.

Kai stood alone in the silence. He looked down at his crotch, adjusting his boxers. He felt lighter, looser. The pressure that had been building since the dormitory was gone, replaced by a profound sense of physical and mental clarity.

A slow, arrogant smile spread across his lips.

"Level 9," he whispered to the empty room. "A harem of two. And a demoness."

He walked over to his bed. The sheets were cool and inviting.

He collapsed onto the mattress, not bothering to get under the covers. He sprawled out on his back, staring up at the ceiling where the portal had opened. He felt strong. He felt dangerous.

"Tomorrow," he thought, his eyelids growing heavy, "the real game begins."

He closed his eyes, the image of Ahena’s cum-covered smile burning in his mind as he drifted into a deep, dreamless sleep of the victorious.
